hero.title: Studio in Rome
hero.subtitle: A unique experience in the heart of the eternal city

description.title: The Studio
description.body: The studio features a comfortable double bed, a fully equipped kitchen area with everything you need to cook, ample counter space and storage. Full private bathroom, wardrobe and space for everyday essentials.

location.title: Location
location.subtitle: Castro Pretorio neighborhood, Rome
location.description: The studio is located in the vibrant Castro Pretorio neighborhood, steps away from Metro B and the National Central Library. A strategic position to explore Rome, with restaurants, cafés and services all within walking distance.

items.giulia_comment: Wonderful place! The studio is exactly as described — elegant, clean and perfectly located. The virtual tour convinced me straight away.
items.james_comment: Absolutely loved it. The location is perfect — within walking distance to the Colosseum. The 360 tour on the listing made it easy to decide. Highly recommend!
items.sofia_comment: The studio is beautiful and exactly what you see in the virtual tour. An authentic experience in Rome, I felt right at home. Would go back without hesitation.
items.marco_comment: A wonderful place in the heart of Rome. The apartment is exactly as shown in the 360 tour, fully equipped kitchen and impeccable bathroom. I'll be back soon!

cta.title: Ready to experience Rome?
cta.subtitle: Book your stay at Studio Via Mentana and discover the eternal city like a local.

footer.tagline: An authentic experience in the heart of Rome
